project_type: React 18 + Vite SPA (social media app called Lifeframe)
build_command: N/A - INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network, cannot run npm install
verification_instructions: Verify all files exist with correct content using file reads and AST-level checks
setup_instructions: N/A - INTEGRATIONS_ONLY mode, no package installation possible
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network mode - cannot run npm install, cannot download from registries, cannot run builds. All files must be created directly. Verification limited to file existence and content checks.
